response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack and polyglot experience but lacks the core requirements for this role. The JD demands 8 years of C++ programming; the resume shows only a brief stint writing C/C++ components at National Instruments (Dec 2014–Jun 2015, ~6 months). There is no evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform work, distributed systems at scale in C++, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not C++ infrastructure.
strengths: Broad polyglot background across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Some exposure to high-throughput microservices (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, millions of req/s in DLang)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum requirement
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure leadership experience
No formal technical-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the scope required

key_factors.factor: Cloud compute platform / large-scale infra experience
